items_flat.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Family in General Availability and Efficiency Push
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 系列全面可用並強調效率
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI has rolled out the GPT-5.6 series (Sol, Terra, Luna) for general availability. The models focus on complex tasks, balanced performance, and efficiency with fewer tokens for cost savings amid industry price competition.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 已推出 GPT-5.6 系列（Sol、Terra、Luna）全面可用。模型專注複雜任務、平衡效能，並以更少 token 提升效率，以因應產業價格競爭。
items_flat.quote: GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new standard for both intelligence and efficiency... more successful work for the same spend.
items_flat.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 為智慧與效率樹立新標準……以相同花費完成更多成功工作。

items_flat.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI Alleging Trade Secret Theft for AI Hardware
items_flat.title_zh: Apple 起訴 OpenAI 竊取貿易秘密用於 AI 硬體
items_flat.summary_en: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and former employees, accusing trade secret theft related to hardware designs and supply chains. OpenAI maintains its hardware timeline remains intact.
items_flat.summary_zh: Apple 對 OpenAI 及前員工提起訴訟，指控竊取與硬體設計和供應鏈相關的貿易秘密。OpenAI 表示其硬體時程不受影響。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 發布 Predicting the Past 技能用於歷史研究
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models, to restore, date, and analyze ancient inscriptions for historians.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past 技能，基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型，幫助歷史學家修復、斷代並分析古代銘文。

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Publishes Research on Claude's Values Across Models and Languages
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 發布 Claude 模型與語言價值差異研究
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic analyzed 300K+ conversations revealing how Claude's expressed values vary across models (e.g., Sonnet vs. Opus) and languages along axes like Warmth vs. Rigor and Deference vs. Caution.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 分析超過 30 萬則對話，揭示 Claude 在不同模型（如 Sonnet 與 Opus）及語言中表達的價值如何沿溫暖 vs. 嚴謹等軸線變化。
items_flat.quote: In new work, we asked how the values Claude expresses vary between Claude models and across languages. We analyzed 300K+ anonymized conversations to find out.
items_flat.quote_zh: 在新的研究中，我們探問 Claude 表達的價值如何在不同模型與語言間變化。我們分析了超過 30 萬則匿名對話以找出答案。

openai.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 為智慧與效率樹立新標準……以相同花費完成更多成功工作。

anthropic.summary_en: Anthropic analyzed 300K+ conversations revealing how Claude's expressed values vary across models (e.g., Sonnet vs. Opus) and languages along axes like Warmth vs. Rigor and Deference vs. Caution.

google.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
google.title_zh: Google DeepMind 發布 Predicting the Past 技能用於歷史研究
google.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models, to restore, date, and analyze ancient inscriptions for historians.
google.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past 技能，基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型，幫助歷史學家修復、斷代並分析古代銘文。

brief_en: OpenAI continues GPT-5.6 rollout amid Apple lawsuit over trade secrets. Google DeepMind advances historical AI tools. Anthropic publishes research on Claude's value variations across models and languages. No major new model launches today.
brief_zh: OpenAI 持續推出 GPT-5.6 系列，同時面臨 Apple 貿易秘密訴訟。Google DeepMind 推進歷史研究 AI 工具。Anthropic 發布 Claude 模型與語言價值差異研究。今日無重大新模型發布。
